step_rationale: Protects cardiomyocytes from ischemia-reperfusion injury and ferroptosis via energy metabolism.
mechanism: Xanthosine alleviates myocardial ischemia-reperfusion injury and ferroptosis, protecting cardiomyocytes through energy metabolism restoration.

references.title: Xanthosine alleviates myocardial ischemia-reperfusion injury through attenuation of cardiomyocyte ferroptosis.
Exploring the mechanism underlying the cardioprotective effect of shexiang baoxin pill on acute myocardial infarction rats by comprehensive metabolomics.
